description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a red gable roof and a mix of dark and light exterior walls. The front facade is accented by large windows and a central entryway, surrounded by lush landscaping including palm trees and shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a private garden area, enclosed by a low wall and filled with flowering trees. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house is set within a landscaped lot, with greenery on all sides, giving it a suburban residential feel. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with clean lines and a welcoming entry.
description: A two-story house with a red gable roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring palm trees and flowering shrubs. The exterior combines dark and light wall finishes, with a prominent entryway and private rear garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and surrounding palm trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the light-colored wall, red roof, and a row of palm trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the enclosed garden area with flowering trees and a low perimeter wall.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the dark exterior wall, red roof, and landscaping on both sides of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a prominent door, small steps, and flanked by landscaping; no porch or columns visible.
